# The Wheel of Time

Monsters: Beasts (../Monsters%20and%20Villains/Beasts%203fefb3b547bb4b4985c3ef149b16290a.md), Supervillains (../Monsters%20and%20Villains/Supervillains%20e279a3db427941fea851e6a6e016ec61.md), Demons (../Monsters%20and%20Villains/Demons%203bf815864dfc4a56ad90365b197f7dd9.md), Curses (../Monsters%20and%20Villains/Curses%208d8f367d6fdd47a580868227f4274a51.md)
Motivations: Vigilent guardian (../../Features/Vigilent%20guardian%20ae3bade8a3584115b07b8fc166d9962c.md), Cursed by manifestations of their sin (../../Features/Cursed%20by%20manifestations%20of%20their%20sin%20e6b7f4b5115f49f18d304c4660f5cbfb.md), Magic and gender conflict (../../Features/Magic%20and%20gender%20conflict%207b13ba4cf8344ed2ab4575da73a18f1f.md), Adventure (../../Features/Adventure%201d458e628ba28026830dfe3db74cba19.md)

# Character influences

<aside>
💡 The character of [Drenodir](../../Data/Characters/Drenodir%20940bfbf595f74f91ad51de93d77ffd66.md) is primarily inspired by Lan Mandragoran and Perrin Aybara.

</aside>

<aside>
💡 [Millamer](../../Data/Characters/Millamer%20b9feb3f85e784020a074f460918e85b7.md) is lightly inspired by Mat Cauthon.

</aside>

<aside>
💡 **Egwene al'Vere had a very minor influence in the design of [Adelle](../../Data/Characters/Adelle%202ff1980fd10b42a7bc0f65b61a2ab3e8.md).**

</aside>

<aside>
💡 I was always impressed with the character of Padan Fain and at times considered how to implement a similar character.

</aside>
